texto: Now of course in hindsight, such a wonderful thing, though never around when you actually need it, I know that I always loved her deeply.

texto: A friendship like theirs was hard to come by, and when such a thing is found, it is often even harder to hold on to.But, as so few come to learn, absence does indeed make the heart grow fonder.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Ross Turner: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo.
